name: bursty
description: Queueing/admission probe: piecewise-constant open-loop rate - 60 s base at 2 rps, then a 15 s burst at 20 rps (10x amplitude), repeating every 75 s for eight cycles. Arrivals stay open-loop within each phase, so queue growth during bursts is fully visible (no coordinated omission). Exercises admission control, shedding, and Retry-After behavior at the gateway. Chat-like lengths, output capped at 512 tokens. Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003).
